name: Binance MCP Server
what_it_does: Binance cryptocurrency exchange MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Binance's API — querying real-time market prices, accessing order books, checking account balances, viewing trading history, and monitoring crypto market data. Can optionally support trading operations (buy/sell orders) depending on API key scope configured.
use_cases: Querying cryptocurrency prices and market data from research agents
Monitoring crypto portfolio balances from financial tracking agents
Analyzing trading history and P&L from financial analysis agents
Watching order books and market depth from market intelligence agents
Research and analysis of crypto market trends from investment research agents
not_for: Automated trading without careful review — executing trades with AI has significant financial risk
Teams not using Binance (use Coinbase, Kraken, or other exchange MCPs)
US users restricted from Binance.com (Binance US has different API)
best_when: A crypto investor or researcher using Binance needs AI assistance monitoring portfolios, querying market data, and analyzing trading history — read-only market data queries are safe and useful.
avoid_when: You need automated trading execution — AI trading carries significant financial risk. Read market data carefully before enabling write-capable API keys.

auth.notes: Binance API key and secret required for authenticated operations. Market data is public (no key needed). Set BINANCE_API_KEY and BINANCE_API_SECRET. CRITICAL: Disable withdrawal permissions on API key.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Binance API is free; market data queries at no cost
pricing.paid_tiers: None for API; Binance charges trading fees (0.1% standard)
pricing.notes: Binance API access is free. Trading fees apply to executed trades. MCP server is free open source. Public market data requires no API key.

performance.rate_limits: Binance strict rate limits: 1200 requests/minute weight limit; trading has tighter limits

known_agent_gotchas: CRITICAL: Never enable withdrawal permissions on API key used with agents — risk of fund loss
CRITICAL: Trading with AI agents carries significant financial risk — start read-only
Binance rate limits are strict and use a weight system — each endpoint has different weights
US availability: Binance.com has restrictions for US users; use Binance.US API if applicable
Market data is highly volatile — agent actions on crypto prices must account for latency
Community MCP — validate all trading operations carefully; bugs can cause financial loss
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. API key/secret. CRITICAL: Disable withdrawal and transfer permissions. Read-only API key strongly recommended. Crypto assets are irreversible if lost. Never expose API secret.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. CRITICAL: Disable withdrawal permissions — irreversible fund loss risk. Use read-only API key. Never expose secret. Crypto is high-stakes.
